parameters: Interact with the water to swim, if you
have a fishing rod you can also fish.
Some doors are locked, find a key or use a lockpick to
Avoid higher level enemies if you are not ready
to fight them, if you trigger a battle with them
you will get a guarantee escape during the first turn.
Move toward the boulder to push it,
Interact with a prism to change the angle
Red prisms can be pushed or dragged
